entry.title: Me after achieving major milestones: nice! What's next? Gotta worry about that now. Me after the most minor mistake: I'm so stoöpeed! I can't do anything right! I'm not good enough 🤭 #free99 #taylorswift

entry.title: I am ✨passive aggressive✨ because I am terrified of confrontation but I don't want people to step all over me 🥰 (there is no excuse to not having connection when you can get @Ubigi App eSIM so easily in over 200 destinations 😤🥴)
